info.name: HRPM Non-Performance API Regression
info.description: Apifox-importable local regression suite. It covers every non-performance endpoint and excludes all performance APIs.

item.name: API-ORG-AUTH-01 Readonly cannot create a department
API-ATT-12 Cancel draft leave request state error
API-ATT-16 Cancel draft overtime state error

exec: const personnel = tasks.find(task => task.businessType === 'PERSONNEL_CHANGE' && task.businessId === pm.environment.get('personnelChangeId'));
const leave = tasks.find(task => task.businessType === 'LEAVE' && task.businessId === pm.environment.get('leaveRequestId'));
const overtime = tasks.find(task => task.businessType === 'OVERTIME' && task.businessId === pm.environment.get('overtimeRequestId'));

item.name: API-WF-03 Transfer leave task to api-admin

exec: const task = pm.response.json().data.find(value => value.businessType === 'LEAVE' && value.businessId === pm.environment.get('leaveRequestId'));

item.name: API-WF-07 Withdraw personnel workflow denied for readonly user
API-WF-07 Personnel effective date not reached

exec: const task = pm.response.json().data.find(value => value.businessType === 'OVERTIME' && value.businessId === pm.environment.get('overtimeRequestId'));
